feed.title: Google Cloud: Unified Maintenance
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Unified Maintenance

entry.content:
Unified Maintenance is generally available (GA).

Use Unified Maintenance to gain better visibility into maintenance activities impacting your Google Cloud resources.

Learn more in the Unified Maintenance overview.
entry.summary: Unified Maintenance is now generally available, providing enhanced visibility into maintenance activities affecting your Google Cloud resources. Learn more about this new feature in the overview documentation.
entry.title: Announcement: Unified Maintenance is now generally available

entry.content:
Unified Maintenance displays maintenance activities for these Google Cloud products:

  • Cloud SQL - MySQL
  • Cloud SQL - Postgres
  • Cloud SQL - SQL Server
  • AlloyDB for PostgreSQL
  • Looker
  • Compute Engine virtual machine (VM) instances or bare metal instances
  • Google Kubernetes Engine
  • Cloud Interconnect
  • Cloud Composer

For more information, see Supported services.
entry.summary: Unified Maintenance now provides a single view for maintenance activities across various Google Cloud services including databases, compute, and networking. This feature simplifies tracking and managing upcoming disruptions. You can find a full list of supported services in the documentation.
entry.title: Feature: Unified Maintenance for Cloud Services

entry.content:
Unified Maintenance is available in the following regions:

  • asia-east1
  • australia-southeast2
  • europe-central2
  • europe-west2
  • europe-west9
  • us-west4
  • us-east5

For more information, see Unified Maintenance locations.
entry.summary: Unified Maintenance is now available in a growing list of regions, including `asia-east1`, `australia-southeast2`, `europe-central2`, `europe-west2`, `europe-west9`, `us-west4`, and `us-east5`. For a full list of supported locations, please refer to the documentation.
entry.title: Announcement: Unified Maintenance Now Live

entry.content:
Unified Maintenance displays Cloud Composer maintenance activity for resources:

  • cloud_composer_environment

For more information about Cloud Composer resources displayed by Unified Maintenance, see Supported services.
entry.summary: Unified Maintenance now shows Cloud Composer environment maintenance. This feature provides visibility into planned activities for your Composer resources. For a full list of supported services, please refer to our documentation.
entry.title: Feature: Maintenance for Composer environments
